order_number.order_type: विधि व न्याय विभाग, शासन परिपत्रक, क्रमांक
order_number.orig_str: विधि व न्याय विभाग, शासन परिपत्रक, क्रमांकः सीएचए-२०२४/प्र.क्र.१२/कार्या-१,दिनांक ०९ ATA, २०२६ सोबतचे परिशिष्ट-अ

para_trans: Final Service Seniority List dated 09.01.2026 of the Officers of Group-B (Gazetted) Cadre, Personal Assistant on Establishment of Charity Commissioner, Maharashtra State, Mumbai.
Government Circular No. CHA-2024 / Q. No.92 / Q.1
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - Department of Law & Justice, Government Circular, Serial No. 21.01.2026

The Commissioner of Charities, Maharashtra State, Mumbai, shall fix the seniority number and date of seniority of the officers of the Group-B (Gazetted) cadre as Personal Assistant on Establishment. 01.01.2026
Tentative Service Excellence List, Reference No. 1 published by the Government Circular herein.

No objection was received within the prescribed period in accordance with this provisional merit list. Considering this, the present Service Excellence List is being finalised. This final merit list is mentioned in Annexure-A to this circular.

A copy of this final merit list is being brought to the notice of the Charity Commissioner, Maharashtra State, Mumbai, all officers of the Group-B (Gazetted) cadre, Personal Assistant on Establishment.
This Government Circular is available on the www.maharashtra.gov.in website of the Government of Maharashtra.
